notes: CLI and diagnostics wave in closure phase. CLI-surface stub retired: cmd/fuse/main.go wires every subcommand (build / run / check / test / fmt / doc / repl / version / help) with the 0/1/2 exit-code contract; compiler/diagnostics renders Rendered text + JSON and runs AuditRule617; compiler/fmt.Format is byte-stable and idempotent; compiler/doc extracts `///` comments and flags missing pub docs (Rule 5.6); compiler/repl runs a deterministic arithmetic + bool-logic evaluator; compiler/driver/cache.go is the content-addressed pass cache with version-mismatch invalidation and deterministic Key/Combine. Tests: TestSubcommandParser, TestTextRendering, TestJsonRendering, TestDiagnosticQualityRule, TestFormatStable, TestDocCheck, TestReplRoundTrip, TestReplErrors, TestReplSessionTermination, TestPassCache (plus Determinism + Corruption), TestIncrementalRebuild, TestCliBasicWorkflow, TestIncrementalEditCycle. STUBS.md W18 history block appended; WC018 logged using Rule 10.2 mandated 6-field template. Twelfth full wave under Rule 9.5 three-commit discipline: P00 audit (5ecb296), implementation (2abb4a2), PCL (this commit). Next: enter W19 Language Server (LSP 3.17).
